info.description: Public catalog and client bookings; auth proxy; admin API for bookings, contracts and sanatoriums. Payment is internal (deal → payment-service).
info.title: Sanatorium Booking API (deal-service)

parameters.description: Payment status: unpaid, invoice_issued, invoice_failed, paid
parameters.name: payment_status

post.description: Creates contract and invoice. manager_id defaults to JWT subject if omitted.

delete.description: Fails with 409 if active confirmed bookings exist.

post.description: Proxies login request to auth-service and returns access token.
Registers a new user with role=client via auth-service.

201.description: User object (id, email, full_name, role, created_at)

get.description: Returns booking list for authorized client.
Returns one booking of authorized client.

put.description: Updates booking dates and guests for authorized client.

post.description: Calculates amount from nights × price_per_night and creates payment invoice.

get.description: Returns catalog profile names for filters and admin forms.
Returns sanatorium catalog with pagination, filtering and sorting.

parameters.description: Maximum distance to sea in km
parameters.name: max_distance_to_sea

get.description: Returns detailed information for one sanatorium.
